purpose: Canonical source for Wave 5 control, reliability and operational state-transition engineering dashboards.

core_control_cases.name: Feed-forward heater compensation
core_control_cases.scenario: User load transient from 20 g/s to 50 g/s
core_control_cases.control_action: Electrical heaters ramp down to stabilize CC suction pressure
core_control_cases.interpretation: The thermal buffer and heater system acts as a dynamic shock absorber.

core_control_cases.name: Cold compressor bypass
core_control_cases.control_action: Ambient heater bypass routes flow to warm compressor train
core_control_cases.interpretation: Bypass preserves operational continuity during upset conditions.

core_control_cases.name: LOOP ride-through
core_control_cases.control_action: QLH buffer and staged compressor rundown preserve thermal stability
core_control_cases.interpretation: Thermal buffering and staged transitions reduce quench/upset probability.

reliability_metrics.target: maximize stabilization without excess exergy destruction
